judge_reason: Description A quotes specific stamp text (e.g., 'KINGDOM VOICE - THE MARCH AHEAD OF TIME', 'FLYING DISC', '62-83894-84', 'RECORDED INDEXED 31 SEP 23 1947 EX-64') that Description B either misquotes (e.g., 'RECORDED', 'INDEXED') or omits entirely, creating direct contradictions on the specific verbatim text present in the visual stamps.
original_image_tags: A handwritten letter on "The Ryan Funeral Home" letterhead. The text is written in black ink. There are several annotations and stamps overlaid on the letter. A blue stamp reads "KINGDOM VOICE - THE MARCH AHEAD OF TIME". A red stamp reads "FLYING DISC". A large red numerical stamp reads "62-83894-84". A blue rectangular stamp reads "RECORDED INDEXED 31 SEP 23 1947 EX-64". There are various handwritten checkmarks, lines, and initials in blue, red, and black ink throughout the document.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned handwritten letter page on cream paper, headed “The Ryan Funeral Home, Bieber, California” with the date “Sept. 19-1947,” three punch holes at the top, and multiple colored handwritten annotations and underlines over the text.*
